name: Mushroom Polenta
recipeIngredient: 1 quart Nonfat Veg Chicken Broth, Low Sodium
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the sliced mushrooms and salt to the skillet. Cook for about 5 minutes until the mushrooms have softened.
3. Stir in the balsamic vinegar and continue cooking until the mushrooms are cooked through. Set aside and keep warm.
4. In a saucepan, bring the nonfat vegetarian chicken broth to a simmer over medium heat. Add the salt.
5. Gradually stir in the instant polenta into the simmering broth, stirring continuously until it thickens and pulls away from the sides of the pot. This should take about 5 minutes.
6. Serve the polenta in warmed bowls topped with the cooked mushrooms. Variations: You can add thin slices of yellow onions when cooking the mushrooms or canned, drained corn kernels just before adding the polenta to the broth.
Variation: When you cook the polenta, you could add 1 cup canned, drained corn kernels just before adding the polenta to the chicken broth.
